<!DOCTYPE qgis PUBLIC 'http://mrcc.com/qgis.dtd' 'SYSTEM'>
<qgis version="3.42.2-Münster">
  <identifier>ABH_NV</identifier>
  <parentidentifier></parentidentifier>
  <language>FR</language>
  <type>dataset</type>
  <title>ABH_NV</title>
  <abstract>REQUIRED: A brief narrative summary of the data set.

REQUIRED: A summary of the intentions with which the data set was developed.</abstract>
  <keywords vocabulary="gmd:topicCategory">
    <keyword>REQUIRED: Common-use word or phrase used to describe the subject of the data set.</keyword>
  </keywords>
  <links>
    <link size="" format="" mimeType="" url="file://\\ISSAMSGE-PC\D$\BD Ressources en eau\ABH\maroc.mdb" type="Local Area Network" name="Personal GeoDatabase Feature Class" description=""/>
  </links>
  <dates/>
  <fees></fees>
  <constraints type="Access">REQUIRED: Restrictions and legal prerequisites for accessing the data set.</constraints>
  <rights>REQUIRED: Restrictions and legal prerequisites for using the data set after access is granted.</rights>
  <encoding></encoding>
  <crs>
    <spatialrefsys nativeFormat="Wkt">
      <wkt></wkt>
      <proj4></proj4>
      <srsid>0</srsid>
      <srid>0</srid>
      <authid></authid>
      <description></description>
      <projectionacronym></projectionacronym>
      <ellipsoidacronym></ellipsoidacronym>
      <geographicflag>false</geographicflag>
    </spatialrefsys>
  </crs>
  <extent>
    <spatial minz="0" maxx="-1.01520499999999991" dimensions="2" maxy="35.92450699999999841" crs="EPSG:4326" maxz="0" minx="-17.10768600000000106" miny="20.76841999999999899"/>
  </extent>
</qgis>
